entries.description: Zero Tolerance family separation policy: Systematic separation of thousands of migrant children from parents, with many still unreunified years later
entries.causation_evidence: DHS Inspector General and federal court records (Ms. L v. ICE)

entries.description: Record 32 deaths in ICE custody in 2025, the deadliest year in over two decades, linked to medical neglect and poor conditions
entries.causation_evidence: DHS OIG, Guardian, and congressional reports

entries.description: At least 23 deaths in ICE custody since October 2025 (on pace to surpass 2025 record), including multiple preventable cases from medical neglect
entries.causation_evidence: NPR, Guardian, and American Immigration Council reporting (2026)

entries.description: Widespread medical neglect, sexual abuse, and unsanitary conditions documented in multiple ICE detention facilities
entries.causation_evidence: DHS OIG, ACLU, HRW, and Amnesty International reports

entries.description: Sharp drop in facility inspections (down 36%) while detention population and deaths surged dramatically
entries.causation_evidence: POGO investigation and DHS OIG data (2025)

entries.description: 77% of new deportation proceedings in 2025 targeted individuals with no criminal convictions
entries.causation_evidence: Guardian analysis of 140,000 I-213 forms (2025)

entries.description: Multiple fatal shootings by ICE agents in 2026, including U.S. citizens, amid aggressive enforcement tactics
entries.causation_evidence: AP, Al Jazeera, and local reporting on 2026 incidents

entries.description: Halt in payments to third-party medical providers leading to denied care and worsened outcomes in detention
entries.causation_evidence: Popular Information and congressional reporting (2025)

entries.description: Massive expansion of street arrests and collateral arrests, often targeting non-criminal individuals to meet quotas
entries.causation_evidence: Brennan Center, Reuters, and Guardian analyses (2025)

entries.description: Overcrowding and tent-camp style detention (e.g., Camp East Montana holding thousands) with reported inhumane conditions
entries.causation_evidence: Amnesty International, ACLU Texas, and congressional letters

entries.description: Criminal misconduct by ICE officers including sexual abuse, assault, and bribery amid rapid hiring surge
entries.causation_evidence: AP investigation (Feb 2026)

entries.description: Arrests of U.S. citizens and lawful residents based on accent, appearance, or mistaken identity
entries.causation_evidence: Brennan Center, CNN, and ACLU reports (2025-2026)

entries.description: Reduced cooperation with oversight and plummeting inspection rates despite record detention numbers
entries.causation_evidence: POGO and congressional oversight findings

entries.description: Aggressive street arrests and raids creating widespread community fear and reduced crime reporting
entries.causation_evidence: Law enforcement and public health studies

entries.description: Homicide ruling in at least one 2026 ICE custody death involving physical restraint
entries.causation_evidence: Medical examiner reports and Texas Tribune coverage

entries.description: Shift toward quota-driven arrests over targeted criminal enforcement, leading to lower proportion of serious offenders
entries.causation_evidence: Brennan Center and Guardian data analysis

entries.description: Reports of beatings, sexual contact, and denial of counsel in facilities like Camp East Montana
entries.causation_evidence: ACLU Texas and Amnesty International reports

entries.description: Continued pattern of masked agents, warrantless home entries, and aggressive tactics drawing civil rights concerns
entries.causation_evidence: American Immigration Council and media investigations (2026)

entries.description: Overcrowded tent camps and rapid expansion of detention without corresponding oversight improvements
entries.causation_evidence: TRAC Immigration and congressional reports

entries.description: Removal of individuals with serious criminal convictions as part of core public safety mission
entries.causation_evidence: ICE official enforcement priority reports

entries.description: Human trafficking and child exploitation investigations leading to numerous rescues and prosecutions
entries.causation_evidence: HSI annual performance reports

entries.description: Arrests and removals of individuals convicted of serious violent crimes including murder, rape, and child abuse
entries.causation_evidence: ICE FY2026 arrest announcements

entries.description: Disruption of transnational criminal organizations through HSI investigations
entries.causation_evidence: ICE/HSI annual reports

entries.description: Collaboration with local law enforcement via 287(g) programs to identify and remove criminal noncitizens
entries.causation_evidence: ICE partnership data

entries.description: Ongoing interdiction of narcotics, weapons, and contraband through interior and border enforcement
entries.causation_evidence: ICE operational statistics

entries.description: Arrests of individuals with multiple serious convictions (including child sex offenses and violent crimes)
entries.causation_evidence: ICE arrest announcements 2025-2026
